title: BOM
description: Bill of Materials v1 contract for SKU production. Production must use a BOM snapshot, not the live recipe/formula.
$comment: Sources: PACK-02 BOM G1 and Snapshot Control; PACK-03 formula scaling. TODO: final BOM version numbering is not defined.

formula_version_id.description: Formula Version used by this BOM.

bom_version.description: BOM version label, usually G1 for current operational use.

generation.description: BOM generation aligned with formula governance.

anchor_ingredient_id.description: Anchor ingredient used for scaling, usually rice.

bom_lines.description: BOM lines including anchor rice, ingredients, and packaging/material lines when governed by this BOM.

snapshot_required.description: Whether a Production BOM Snapshot is required before production order creation.
